title: 4pcs Rubber Jar Opener Bottle Gripper Non Slip Pad Multi-function Can Opener for Seniors with Arthritis Weak Hands (Circle Two)
description:
✅【Multi-functional】The rubber jar opener work as coasters and heat-insulated mats, opening jars and lids, a practical kitchen gadget for different needs.
✅【Durable & Non-slip】The jar opener gripper pad is made of high quality rubber, which is long lasting and flexibility. The rubber material and texture design make it perfectly non-slip.
✅【Easy to Use】You just need to place the rubber jar opener on the top of the bottle, twist it , you can easily open different bottles.
✅【Ideal Gift】The can opener is an ideal tool for women and elderly to open jars, bottles and many other things with covers.
✅【Jar Gripper Set】You will get 4 pieces rubber openers, hope they are good helps for you.
reviews_5s: It helps me open jars and get a grip in the lid. I like the productI have RA and have been fumbling for a while with getting simple lids and tops open. I’ve tried the openers that you squeeze but they did not work for me. Something as simple as these silicone circles have really helped me open anything, I keep one in my car, 1 at bedside and 2 in my kitchen. Best purchase and value for the money.I have medical issues with my hands which make it hard to grip things sometimes. I also have very small hands, which makes it very hard to get a grip on something larger. These are a life saver! The grip is fantastic, I don't have to use nearly as much pressure to move things. Even if you have larger, stronger hands, you can make things much tighter or losen very stiff items. They are simple and easy to use. I've used two at a time to hold and twist two ends of things, like putting on a new shower head with almost no effort to get the connection tight with no leaks!These are great when you loose the grip in hands. Open bottle and jars one on top and one on bottom. Can't tighten hose so it doesn't leak... works for that too. Many uses inexpensive. I paid for mine not a vine person!Do not hesitate to buy. Makes life much easier.Not much to say. These are simple however I always have a few around for gripping and these do the job.These open jars. They are brightly colored and look like the photo. Not sure what else to say but they are exactly what they say they are.These jar grippers are a must to open those tight lids! Easy to use.These are great little helpers for arthritic hands! Bright colors and inexpensive! Opens jars and bottles easily .. That’s it !!!These are hard to find anymore -
reviews_1s:
Keep shopping!

I don't understand the good reviews. Unbelievably flimsy, and has zero grip. My mom bought one randomly that is a slick silicone that is amazing!! It was a random purchase so I can't replicate.

I used to have the kind with handles you squeeze with 3 different size holes, I hated it.Don’t like it. Need to find mesh gripper. This one is too sticky
